view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Access history and remaining limits visibility', but the evidence provided does not demonstrate this capability. While there are multiple successful prior steps indicating that customers can book offers and view their bookings, there is no direct evidence showing how access history and remaining limits are presented to the user. The lack of specific checks or endpoints related to this requirement leads to a conclusion that the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
